title: Rich and Pungent Indian Ground Allspice Curry
description: A flavorful, pungent, and invigorating Indian-inspired brunch dish featuring ground allspice, carefully balanced to follow Ayurvedic principles.
instructions: Heat ghee in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the ground allspice, turmeric, cumin, red chili powder, and salt. Cook for 1 minute, until the spices are fragrant.
Add 1 cup of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Stir in the cooked brown basmati rice.
Use an ice bath to shock the curry, then return it to the skillet and simmer for an additional 2 minutes.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve with naan or over the brown basmati rice.
Serve immediately, garnished with cilantro and a side of naan, if desired.
